name: Down Town
description:
You are in the down town of the city, you can see here a small fountain,
it look strange and you notice that it doesnt have water, insted it has
table wine. To the east you see a small magic shop, and the street has been
ornamented with some colorful papers that says "whe have the best magic 
shop of all France.", and to the west is a small miscellaneous shop.
